intended_use: InVision Precision Cardiac Amyloid is intended to provide adjunctive information on a patient's cardiovascular condition (diagnostic aid for cardiac amyloidosis).
intended_use_full: InVision Precision Cardiac Amyloid is intended to provide adjunctive information on a patient's cardiovascular condition (diagnostic aid for cardiac amyloidosis).
ground_truth: Confirmatory reference data such as diagnostic imaging or pathology
other_metrics: Subgroup analysis performed across age, gender, BMI, race/ethnicity, cardiac amyloidosis type, sites, and imaging manufacturers; device passed acceptance criteria across all subgroups. Human factors validation with 16 non-cardiologists and 15 cardiologists demonstrated users could safely and effectively interact with the device. Cybersecurity testing (Dynamic Code Analysis, Vulnerability Scanning, Fuzz Testing, Penetration Testing) identified no vulnerabilities.
